'''''Nuance''''' was a [[Strike-class medium cruiser|''Strike''-class medium cruiser]] once belonging to a [[Nami]] arms merchant before being captured by [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] forces.

In [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]], the ''Nuance'' was part of a transfer operation where it intended to sell [[TIE/d "Defender" Multi-Role Starfighter/Legends|TIE Defenders]] duplicated from a prototype they had stolen to the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]], who had taken interest in acquiring the advanced craft. [[Tan (title)|Tan]] [[Maarek Stele/Legends|Maarek Stele]] and his strike force, debuting the new [[Missile Boat]]s were deployed to disable and capture the ''Nuance'' before the transfer could be completed. The ''Nuance'' responded by launching multiple wings of [[R60 T-wing interceptor|T-wings]] to engage the Imperial pilots while several [[Delta-class DX-9 stormtrooper transport]]s proceeded to lay a minefield around the parked vessel. This defense failed however and Stele managed to disable the ''Nuance'' with the help of [[Alpha-class Xg-1 Star Wing/Legends|Alpha-class Xg-1 Star Wings]]. Then the [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]] ''[[Grey Wolf]]'' arrived and sent a [[Gamma-class ATR-6 assault transport|''Gamma''-class ATR-6 assault transport]] to seize control of the vessel.

The surviving pilots of the ''Nuance'' continued to resist the boarding operation and were reinforced by a responding Rebel force led by the [[Carrack-class light cruiser/Legends|Carrack-class light cruiser]] ''[[Prism]]'', which had arrived to collect the TIE Defenders. This effort failed however as the the Rebels were swiftly routed while the ''Nuance'' and its critical cargo were now in Imperial hands.

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: TIE Fighter (video game)|''Star Wars: TIE Fighter'']]
